biological_replicate: the nuclear lysate of MCF7 cells and the proteomes from MCF7 and MCF10A cells were compared
technical_replicate: the peptide mixtures that were analyzed in triplicate by nanoLC-MS/MS
experimental_design: Integrating AP-MS data with quantitative proteomics comparing MCF7 to non-tumorigenic MCF10A cells
factor_value: comparing MCF7 to non-tumorigenic MCF10A cells
number_of_technical_replicates: the peptide mixtures that were analyzed in triplicate
